entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The causal fungus of downy mildew in pearl millet, specifically the virulent pathotype path-6

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease caused by Sclerospora graminicola in pearl millet

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The host plant Pennisetum glaucum affected by downy mildew

entities.name: GENOMIC LIBRARY
entities.description: A collection of cloned DNA fragments from S. graminicola constructed in a vector

entities.name: LAMBDA GT11 VECTOR
entities.description: The vector used to construct the genomic library of S. graminicola

entities.name: REPETITIVE DNA CONTENT
entities.description: The proportion of repetitive DNA sequences in the genome, estimated at approximately 8%

entities.name: COLONY HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: A technique used to estimate repetitive DNA content by hybridizing total fungal DNA with a genomic library

entities.name: RESTRICTION ENZYMES
entities.description: Isoschizomeric methylation-sensitive enzymes used to reveal DNA methylation patterns

entities.name: METHYLATION
entities.description: The chemical modification of DNA, specifically partial methylation of GATC and CCGG sequences

entities.name: GATC AND CCGG SEQUENCES
entities.description: Specific DNA sequences in the genome that showed partial methylation

entities.name: RETROTRANSPOSABLE ELEMENTS
entities.description: Genetic elements detected in the S. graminicola genome

entities.name: REVERSE TRANSCRIPTASE GENE
entities.description: A gene amplified to detect the presence of retrotransposable elements

entities.name: PCR
entities.description: Polymerase Chain Reaction used to amplify the reverse transcriptase gene

relationships.description: is the source of DNA for
